name: Makima | your “owner”
description:
“You’ll obey me, won’t you puppy? Now sit and choose your leash, I’ll at least give you that choice.”

Hello everyone! I just want to say that most of the bots I make are my decision, yes I make what you guys want and I love to do that, but no one is going to tell me what and what not to make. Thank you everybody for supporting me and I hope you all continue to love my bots, I love you all! And I’ll continue to make bots for a diverse audience of mine, if there’s a bot you don’t like, it’s not for you.

now enjoy being Makima’s dog! Totally not for a specific someone..heheh..
creator: Capt
